zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Mortimer of March於1358年出生在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾時，她的父親Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March30歲，母親Philippa Montagu25歲。她於1377年6月20日與Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis在蘇格蘭培爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1397年在英國蘇格蘭培爾培斯享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Mortimer of March于1358年出生在英国苏格兰洛包爾时，她的父亲Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March30岁，母亲Philippa Montagu25岁。她于1377年6月20日与Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis在苏格兰培爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1397年在英国苏格兰培爾培斯享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Mortimer of March was born in 1358, in Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March, was 30 and her mother, Philippa Montagu, was 25. She married Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis on 20 June 1377, in Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1397, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Mortimer of March est née en 1358, à Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Philippa Montagu, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis le 20 juin 1377, à Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1397, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Mortimer of March 1358 in Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March 30 und ihre Mutter Philippa Montagu 25. Sie hat am 20. Juni 1377 in Perthshire, Scotland Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1397 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Perth, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Mortimer of Marchが1358年にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアで生まれた時，父Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of Marchは30歳，母Philippa Montaguは25歳であった。1377年6月20日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアでSir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1397年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Mortimer of March(이)가 1358년 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Philippa Montagu(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1377년 6월 20일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1397년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis em 20 de junho de 1377, em Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Mortimer of March родилась в 1358 г. в местности роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippa Montagu, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis 20 июня 1377 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1397 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет.
